Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.label: lasting thought impact
Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.description: A meaningful positive or negative thought impact was recorded for a pawn.

Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.label: released from captivity
Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.description: A pawn was intentionally released from prisoner status.

Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.label: witnessed magic
Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.description: A pawn witnessed another pawn using magic.

Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.label: witnessed necromancy
Legacy.Domain.LegacyEventDef.description: A pawn witnessed another pawn raising or commanding the dead.
